creator: almarrie@gmail.com
text:
kxgenerator doesn't work, it just hogs the cpu and nothing happened.

  PID USERNAME    THR PRI NICE   SIZE    RES STATE  C   TIME   WCPU COMMAND
24858 arabian       1 130    0 54008K 46632K RUN    1   2:36 91.96% kxgenerator

Here is my make.conf

CPUTYPE?=k8
KERNCONF=ARABIAN
BATCH=yes
COMPAT5X=yes            # FreeBSD 5.x compatibility
# Disable VuXML checks, vulnerable ports are marked FORBIDDEN anyway and
# this prevents installing with non-vulnerable options (see win32-codecs)
DISABLE_VULNERABILITIES=yes

# Compile with cups support
WITH_CUPS=yes

# Makes cups shadow printing support in the base system
CUPS_OVERWRITE_BASE=yes

# Use Firefox's gecko engine since it's preinstalled
WITH_MOZILLA=firefox
WITH_GECKO=firefox

How-To-Repeat: Install it in FreeBSD 6.2 and you'll find it with the latest KDE 3.5.5
